use_cases: Displaying structured data in a tabular format with row-level actions
Editing or viewing detailed information through modal dialogs
Showing status indicators using badge variants within table cells
Managing datasets with interactive row selection
ai_summary: A data table component with integrated dialog functionality for viewing and managing structured data. Includes a reusable Badge component with multiple style variants (default, secondary, destructive, outline) for displaying status indicators and categorical information within table rows. Designed for SaaS and business applications requiring data management interfaces.
